cards.back: A decision problem for which it is unknown whether a polynomial-time algorithm exists to determine the correctness of an approximation algorithm
A decision problem that is at least as hard as the hardest problems in NP, and every problem in NP can be reduced to it in polynomial time
A tree-like data structure that represents a flowchart for making decisions, typically used to model computational problems
A decision problem that is at least as hard as the hardest problems in NP, but it is not known whether a polynomial-time algorithm exists to solve it exactly
A decision problem that is in NP, but it is not known whether it is NP-Hard or NP-Complete
